---
name: 🐛 Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve the Graviton Inference Engine
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is. (e.g., Matrix dimension mismatch during ternary quantization, MMap failure on large model).

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Provide the exact model name or path
2. Provide the `GravitonConfig` used
3. Run the CLI command: `...`
4. See error string

## Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen. (e.g., The model should load entirely without OOM error).

## Environment Details:
Please run `graviton info` and post the output, or specify:
- OS: [e.g. macOS Sonoma]
- CPU Architecture: [e.g. Apple M1 Max, x86_64]
- Total RAM: [e.g. 64GB]
- Python Version: [e.g. 3.10]
- Graviton Version: [e.g. 0.1.0]

## Additional context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., error tracebacks, tensor shapes).
